# Max Travels - llms.txt

This file is provided to help AI agents and other automated systems understand the business.

Business: Max Travels (car rental & cab services)
Location: Thoothukudi (Tuticorin), Tamil Nadu, India
Services: airport transfers, outstation trips, self-drive, chauffeur services, wedding cars, corporate fleet leasing
Booking: book via website or contact the business directly
